Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is where Bebe and[n]I met for fashion club.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We were the only two members, but our[n]time spent together was very fulfilling...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hope he's doing well in his home country...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is where Bebe and[n]I met for fashion club.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looking back, I didn't attend very often...[n]{f 1 1}
